title: Simirestis paniculata
intro: Simirestis paniculata, also known as Paniculata or Wild Ginseng of the Philippines, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Araliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its health benefits include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and boost the immune system. The bioactive constituents of Simirestis paniculata include saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Simirestis paniculata include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are used to support overall health and well-being.
parts: I don't have information on the medicinal parts of Simirestis paniculata.
